steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The blank fits between her and Gothic (2020): her ______ Gothic (2020). The choices test how the title Mexican Gothic connects to the noun novel.

steps.title: Apply the appositive rule
steps.content:
Because Mexican Gothic is an essential (restrictive) appositive — it specifies which of Moreno-Garcia's novels is meant — no comma should separate it from novel.

Choice A correctly omits punctuation: her novel Mexican Gothic.

B introduces a colon (not used for restrictive appositives), C adds a comma (turning it into a nonrestrictive appositive, which the context doesn't support), and D opens a parenthesis without closing it.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
